word: G1599 - ἐκπέμπω - ekpémpō - ek-pem'-po - Send away

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκπέμπω

- Transliteration: Ekpempo

- Phonetic: ek-pem'-po

- Definition:

1. to send away, send forth

- Origin: from G1537 and G3992

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G3992; to despatch: - send away (forth).
